case_title: DENNIS BERNSTEIN VS. RANDOX LABORATORIES, LTD.

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BERNSTEIN, DENNIS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RANDOX LABORATORIES, LTD. $56,367.43 PRINCIPAL, $6,615.84 INTEREST, $295.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $63,278.77, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION

ORIGINAL NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT AND PROOF OF SERVICE ON APPLICATION AND NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BERNSTEIN, DENNIS SERVED JUN-30-2005, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RANDOX LABORATORIES, LTD. PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION. WRIT MAY ISSUE ON AUG-01-2005 IF NO MOTION FILED BY DEFENDANT

APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF BERNSTEIN, DENNIS AS TO DEFENDANT RANDOX LABORATORIES, LTD. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT RANDOX LABORATORIES, LTD.
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, AS TO DEFENDANT RANDOX LABORATORIES, LTD.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $64,252.97 AS TO DEFENDANT RANDOX LABORATORIES, LTD.
